purpose: Record reproducible practice cases, frozen claims, later observations, and learning reflections without treating personal outcomes as proof of classical authority or knowledge correctness.

tianjiCorrections: separate source authority from personal outcome summaries
freeze and version claims before observation
record engine and school contracts for chart reproducibility
preserve unresolved and missing follow-up in every denominator
prevent outcomes from automatically changing learning mastery

fields.domain: bazi | liuyao | ziwei | qimen | meihua | fengshui | other
fields.chartSnapshotRef: immutable chart or input snapshot id
fields.engineContract: engine id, semantic version or commit, algorithm mode, and timezone data version
fields.schoolContract: declared school, day boundary, calendar, leap-month, true-solar-time, and other domain-specific choices
fields.inputPrecision: which civil time, place, timezone, and uncertainty fields were actually known
fields.exactBirthDataRef: optional encrypted/local-only reference; never a public display field

fields.knowledgePointIds: accepted or candidate Tianji knowledge point ids
fields.sourceRefs: edition- and location-aware classical or school references
fields.schoolScope: school or interpretation contract to which this method belongs

methodReference.rule: Practice status cannot promote authority status.

fields.observableCriteria: predeclared event category and minimum observable threshold
fields.disconfirmationCriteria: what non-occurrence or contrary event resolves the claim against support
fields.primaryClaim: whether this was the single primary claim selected before the outcome window

fields.eventTime: event time or bounded interval when known
fields.resultSummary: observable result without rewriting the original claim
fields.privateEvidenceRef: optional local/private reference, never copied into public learning content

fields.rationale: comparison against the frozen criteria; no post-hoc claim rewrite

learningReflection.rule: Real-world outcome ratings may schedule reflection but do not award or remove mastery.

metricContract.label: user_observed_outcome_summary_not_method_truth
eligibleRecordRequirements: claim locked before the outcome window
time window and observable criteria present
risk class is cultural_low_stakes or personal_reflection
metricContract.minimumSampleRule: No sample count alone permits a verified or generally valid label.

privacyContract.publicExportRequires: explicit subject consent, case-level redaction review, and exclusion of high-stakes content
